entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hi, it is great to meet you in the community. I live in the US outside of Philadelphia.

If you haven't yet be sure to join the many Interest Groups | SAP Community and Asia Pacific | Location-Based Groups | SAP Community.

Best of luck!

entry.title: SAP Desktop Agent is not running in unattended mode
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I have created an invoice extraction process using SAP Business Process Automation and installed SAP Desktop Agent version 3.24.X. I have also configured all necessary settings in SAP Build Process Automation Cockpit, including the environment setup and other required configurations.

The process runs as expected when tested in design mode. However, after deploying the release, I am facing the following issues:

  1. The application does not seem to execute in unattended mode in the Desktop Agent.
  2. The application is in running ... in monitor.
  3. The project is not deploying to the Desktop Agent.

I have attached screenshots of my configurations for your reference. Could you please assist in troubleshooting why the project is not deploying or executing properly in unattended mode?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hi, great to meet you. It sounds like you have great project experience and learn continuously. Be sure to join Interest Groups | SAP Community to engage with many community members.

Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow in Sales Documents
entry.content:
Hi ,

Anyone encounter the below error when creating workflow for Customer return document ( DOC category RE) .
All the configuration has done like scenario activation , service activation  .

Workflows for other document categories are working fine except return document.

Can anyone assist here .

Thanks.

entry.title: How to reverse-engineer a JSON file into a PDM in PD Web
entry.content:
I know you can reverse-engineer a JSON file into a PDM in PD Web but I haven't done it for a while. The documentation on Reverse-Engineering JSON Schemas makes it sound simple - "To derive a NoSQL diagram from a JSON data file, select Menu > Reverse-Engineer JSON Data, navigate to the file you want to import, and click Open."

There's only one problem - I can't find that option on any menu anywhere in PD Web. My user has permission to do everything in PD Web, and I have full permissions on the model.

entry.title: SAP OData Call to Different Backends ( 403 Error)
entry.content:
I am working on an SAPUI5 project where I need to call two OData services originating from different backend systems:

  1. One service comes from an On-Premise S/4 HANA system.
  2. The other service is from an ABAP Cloud environment hosted in SAP BTP.

Individually, both services work perfectly. However, when I try to call both within the same project, I encounter a 403 Forbidden error for the service that is called using the unnamed model ( means the service which is added later as secondary service) .

I am using BAS as my IDE and adding the services using Service Manager. I am not calling the Odata service with any method. I am directly binding  the entities on the page with two different tables. 

Has anyone faced a similar issue or knows how to resolve this? Any insights on handling multiple OData services from different backends in an SAPUI5 application would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: LSMW with object 0070 and program RV14BTCI, XK15 and...
entry.content: I hope there are no vendors with 2 or more trailing spaces in their code?

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS View - Length of CAST rounded in 7.40 SP8
entry.content: @SrinivasaMural Thank you for testing it. I just tested on an ABAP 7.52 SP04, Kernel 753 PL400, Linux system, it's also good, taking 24 characters as expected. I still couldn't find this bug documented somewhere.

entry.title: EWM cancellation WT creates new WT on the background
entry.content:
Hi,

I setup automatic WT created for Custom Delivery type - it works fine and every time delivery is created in EWM, the WT is automatically created. 

The problem is, when I manually cancel the WT, the WT is immidiatelly auto-created again. 

I think its somewhere in the DLVPPFC settings so I tried to play with status changes - tried Empty value, also tried NSNS value but for both the result was same (i used Change mode I). Please let me know how to fix that to auto-create WT only during the Delivery creation

Second question - can I somehow include condition to dont create WT if WT is not created for whole delivery qty?

entry.title: Re: Safety time
entry.content:
Hello @jerrysam 

Safety time is defined with the SHZET data element:

Two digits, i.e. up to 99 workdays is more than enough. I think something must be seriously off in your MRP planning if you need more than that.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Safety time
entry.content:
Hello Dominik,

 

Thankyou for the quick response , could you guide me the path to reach to that configuration in s4 Hana 

will it be any issue if we change length o 3 digits in p system will it have any consequences ..

scenario:

we have an issue with supplier That provides material very late meanwhile its reallly important to stock up material for manufacturing that's the reason we wanted setup this 3 digit days  number in our company

entry.title: Re: RAP - implement a validation on delete action
entry.content: Actually, this was exactly what I was looking for (while I stumbled upon your question), so thank you too for sharing this solution!

entry.title: Re: UMVKN and UMVKZ are blank when creating SO with reference
entry.content: facing same issue for SO created via EDI or Upload Program

entry.title: Re: Can change documents be written when using the ADDR_C...
entry.content: Basically, as you didn't commit work/luw, database was updated by an implicit database commit only and registred calls in update task were never processed...

entry.title: ByD Custom OData service - get employee planned time
entry.content:
Hi,

I've created a custom OData Service in ByD to extract tracked times from our employees using the `EmployeeTimeItemCollection` business object. This works great.

However, I also need the individual "planned working time" ("Sollarbeitszeit" in Germany). I know there is the default report "Employee Times: Monthly - Report" (HCMTLMU01_Q0002) which nicely shows the planned working time for each employee and month. Unfortunately I can't use the OData feature for this report because I get the following error:

HTTP GET: https://myXXXXXX.sapbydesign.com/sap/byd/odata/ana_businessanalytics_analytics.svc/RPHCMTLMU01_Q0002QueryResults?$select=KCPLANNED_TIME,CEMPLOYEE_UUID&$format=json

 

{
    "error": {
        "code": "00145E5B1CC71EE0ACBD33E944B1819D",
        "message": {
            "lang": "en",
            "value": "Property C0CHAR_STRUCTURE (Entity Type RPHCMTLMU01_Q0002): mandatory filter is missing"
        }
    }
}

 

I came across SAP note https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2419785 which says that there are some reports that can't be used with OData so I guess that's one of them.

I already had a look at a whole bunch of business objects but I can't find the correct one:

Could you assist here?

entry.title: Re: SAP Customer Data Cloud Screen-sets handling custom l...

entry.title: Group Reporting (1SG) - Is it possible to bypass it by creating a Chart of Account?
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

 

I have a theoretical question that came to mind, and I would appreciate your insights. Would it be possible to bypass the 1SG scope item by creating a custom chart of accounts and assigning YCOA accounts to it? In this scenario, the customer could have a chart of accounts named "Group CoA" and use it for consolidation.
 
While we are proceeding with the implementation of 1SG, I am curious to know whether this approach would be a viable alternative or if there are any limitations to consider.
 
Looking forward to your thoughts.

entry.title: Unleash the Future of Business: Join SAP Business Unleashed on February 13, 2025
entry.content:
Explore how SAP is revolutionizing business by leveraging the power of AI, data, and applications like never before. Join us on February 13, 2025, for SAP Business Unleashed, a virtual event where you’ll gain exclusive insights, witness groundbreaking innovations in action, and discover new strategies to optimize and transform every aspect of your organization. Don’t miss this opportunity to see how SAP’s integrated approach can help your business achieve its full potential.

 

 

Why Attend SAP Business Unleashed?

At this must-attend virtual event, you will:

  • Unleash Your Full Potential and Become Unstoppable: Explore the next era of enterprise management, where applications, data, and AI converge. Speaker: Christian Klein, Chief Executive Officer and member of the SAP Executive Board, SAP SE
  • Discover Insights from an Analyst’s Perspective: Learn about the opportunities in a connected suite with integrated data. Speaker: Mickey North-Rizza, Group Vice-President, Enterprise Software, IDC
  • Explore SAP’s Application, Data, and AI Innovations: Gain insights into new product innovations; experience a live demo and hear from a global customer. Speaker: Muhammad Alam, Member of the SAP Executive Board, SAP Product Engineering, SAP SE
  • Bring Innovations to Action: See how SAP Business AI and Joule orchestrate complex tasks using agentic AI. Speaker: Muhammad Alam, Member of the SAP Executive Board, SAP Product Engineering, SAP SE

Event Details:

  • Date: Thursday, February 13, 2025
  • Time: 8:00 a.m. PST | 11:00 a.m. EST | 5:00 p.m. CET

This is your opportunity to connect with the brightest minds, explore cutting-edge technology, and gain the insights you need to stay ahead. Don’t miss out! Register now to save your spot to discover how SAP's latest solutions can connect and harmonize all your data, integrating and optimizing every part of your business.

entry.title: New AWS option for SAP ODP data extraction
entry.content:
In November 2024, AWS updated its guidance for SAP Data Extraction with a Glue connector.

This adds to the previous guidance using Amazon AppFlow service. But when to use what? lets dive in

 

 

 

Amazon Appflow Approach

AppFlow is the AWS pre-configured integration service, if you are familiar with SAP Integration Suite, Fivetran, Airbyte or similars, you already know the drill. One tool to connect all, highly transactional, easy to configure.

AppFlow has a pre-configured SAP OData Connector, so we don't need to build it. Since its launch, it has been super easy to set up a data flow from SAP to AWS in just a few clicks, great for prototyping and relative small data sets replication.

 

AppFlow makes it simple, in 4 steps you define the flow, you prepare the data, add transformations, partitioning and aggregation if necessary and in a few clicks you have your raw data on AWS.

 

Integration is quite flexible in a low-code no-code fashion and allows modern file formats, the next step, depending of the case, would be to curate the data, with services like Glue.

 

New AWS Glue Approach

Now, AWS has introduced an AWS Glue OData connector for SAP, contrary to an Integration service, Glue provides a serverless data processing (ETL) service. It's based on Spark.

Glue is more suitable for extensive data integration as well as distributed data processing capabilities, complex transformations, and analytics.

So this week, AWS announced the Odata Connector on Glue. Great because we dont need to learn Scala to build our own connector.

 

 

AWS provides more than 40 predefined connectors, plus hundreds of more connectors available through the AWS Marketplace. Glue capabilities are immense, they not only provide extensive ETL capabilities, but most importantly, they store the Data Catalog, a critical feature for search and query using Amazon Athena or Amazon Redshift.

AWS Glue ETL Workflow. Courtesy of AWS

 For entire details of the new Glue connector to SAP, read this blog;

https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/big-data/scaling-rise-with-sap-data-and-aws-glue/

 Key Differences and when to use

Literature

https://docs.aws.amazon.com/glue/latest/dg/connecting-to-data-sap-odata.html

https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/big-data/scaling-rise-with-sap-data-and-aws-glue/

entry.title: Windows Server 2025 Support
entry.content:
Hello
I understand that Windows Server 2025 will be supported soon for SAP, no?
What is the date forecast for this?
Thanks

entry.title: Enhancing Filter Visibility in SAP Analytics Cloud Numeric Pointer Charts
entry.content:
Solution

Add a Text Box to the Story Page: -

You can add this text box to sit on top of the Numeric point chart, you can place it in any position on the story or drag it on top of the chart, as shown below I have placed the Text Box on top of the 2nd Numeric Point Chart: -

Click on the … button, then click on +Add -> Dynamic Text as shown below: -

A dialog box will open called: Insert Dynamic Text. In this box, scroll down and select the required chart that you want to add the Year value to.
Note: You must be careful in identifying the correct Numeric Point chart such that the correct year filter value will be displayed on each respective Numeric Point chart.
Process is shown below: -

a) Here I have selected the 2nd Numeric Point Chart: Operation, because I want to refer to the year value of only this chart.

b) Drill down on the filter section of the chart

c) Select the required filter value, here it is Plan Year.

d) Once you are done with the above, click on Create in Insert Dynamic text box.


The Year value will now start showing on the text box now: -

Note: You can also add some text manually (before & after to the year value) if you so require. Just click on the year value and position your cursor as needed.

For formatting the value in the text box, since this is dynamic text, just select the value and then right click the value in the text box and then select Edit Styling… as shown below: -

You can make multiple filter selections(e.g., on Year) on the Numeric Point Chart and then based on that the Text Box value will change automatically.

entry.title: Re: Safety time
entry.content:
Hello @jerrysam 

The length of the safety time field is not customizable. Theoretically, but just theoretically, you could change the data element to 3 digits. However, it will lead to mass regeneration of dependent objects. If you are extremely lucky, that will not break down the system. Most probably it will. Such a disaster won't be covered by SAP maintenance. So when you ask SAP support for help, they will issue a fat bill, once they stop laughing. 

There is the note 2422504 - MM02: Increasing the MARC-SHZET field length telling basically the same. 

You could add a custom field for longer safety time as indicated in the note 44410 - Integrating customer-specific fields in the material master. But then you would need to modify standard MRP logic to use the custom field instead of the standard one - check the documentation to the configuration node Production -> Material Requirements Planning -> Business Add-Ins for Requirements Planning for details on MRP enhancements.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Lot sizing procedure for Make-to-Order
entry.content:
Hi Caetano, 

Thanks for your posts, they are always very interesting and complete.

I did the same setup and it's working very well.
For a particular order it's not creating the planned ones. I suspect that the problem is the horizon. How is it defined? What is it given by? Wath does it means "I in the Short-Term Horizon"?

Thanks for the help

Giuseppe

entry.title: AATP oprions for manual allocation/re-allocation
entry.content: New to SAP and need some advice from you. We have SAP S4/HANA 2023 version with AATP solution which I think is a powerful tool however since we are in the automotive business with highly fluctuating demands and urgent requests sometimes (basically on a weekly basis) we need to help out customers with some extra in order to avoid production line stoppages. I fully understand AATP (BOP, PAL etc.. possibilities) Our lead times are high ~16 weeks since we are distributing parts also next to our own production. My simple question is that is there any possibility that the quantites that ATP allocated to a sales order re-allocating somehow to an other SO/customer?

entry.title: Register Now – Q1 Recruiting User Group Meeting – Feb 27th
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the "Register Now" button or "Yes" to "Will you be attending?" will NOT register you for the event. To register for the event, please REGISTER HERE in order to receive the meeting invite and login details. 

Q1 Recruiting User Group Meeting

Thursday, February 27th - 11:00 am - 12:30 pm Eastern

REGISTER NOW!

Our Recruiting User Group is customer led by Purdue and Nestlé. This meeting will provide you with an opportunity to connect with peer Recruiting customers, submit questions to chat with others about, hear from Recruiting experts and listen to a Customer Spotlight.

If you haven’t already, please subscribe to the Customer Empowerment Events Newsletter HERE!  It’s a great resource to stay up to date on all User Group sessions globally.  Also, please check out the User Group Calendar HERE!

Any questions about this meeting, please reach out to Lindsay Westra, Director, User Engagement, SAP SuccessFactors at lindsay.westra@sap.com.  Thank you!

entry.title: Exposing JWKS from SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi experts

One of the integration scenario where we have synchronous communication between S4->Integration suite-> Third Party application(target system).
As part of the synch flow we need to send sensitive infor like DOB,SSN and hence the need to send this data in encrypted format.
The target system s using a JWKS(JSON Web Key set) method to secure the data and hence requesting the same to be used in Integration suite. JWKS keys will be exposed on an URL endpoint by target system to be used by SAP IS.
Can someone share information/links on JWKS encryption method in Integration suite where we know how to share JWKS keys, can anyone help us with details on how JWKS keys are to be created and exposed from Integration suite over an endpoint controlled in Integration suite.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Direct URL for SAP HANA Incentive Management with SSO
entry.content: I am interested in the answer to this too. Let me know if you hear anything.

entry.title: Re: SF - Time Sheet - Recording of Allowances
entry.content:
Hi Volker,

I was able to configure the business rule. However, it only works for the entire timesheet. I couldn’t find a way for the rule to check just a single day. Can you tell me if this is possible, or if only the entire timesheet or its period can be considered?

As always your help is very much appreciated. 

Kind regards, 

Alexandra

entry.title: Exploring Formats in SAC Add-In for MS Excel
entry.content:
Two  Different Types of Formats can be applied for different use case.

I.Add-In Default Format :This is a format owned by the Add-In, applied at the workbook or table level. It allows the creation of interactive formats that automatically update when underlying data changes, such as after drilling into a hierarchy or changing a dimension's axis, and retains the format after refreshing the report. It's a combination of Styling and Number format.

1- Styling: It contains three levels combined with a funnel approach:

  • Cell Styles: The formats of the add-in are shown in the Custom area of the Cell Styles on the Excel home tab. From there, it is possible to define specific formats. It is defined by the nature of the report cells as headers, rows, data, properties, etc., and is applied to the complete workbook.

  • Style by Table: With QRC12025, a new styling capability has been introduced to define formats by table. It is possible to define formats in a table based on a selected member cell, member or property of a dimension.The scope of the format can be also defined as Member, Data...

 

 

 

 

  • Conditional Formatting: Can be used to highlight important values or unexpected results in a table, making patterns and trends in the data more apparent. To use conditional formats, thresholds are defined that determine the format of cells based on their values, such as sales for a product in different regions with cell colors tied to cell values. Note: It is possible to use table formats and conditional formats in a table. If there is a conflict between them, the conditional format overrules the table format.2- Number Format: The default definition available is taken from the model settings defined in SAP Analytics Cloud, but it can be changed directly from the Add-In and then kept. The definition is applied by measure or account, but if both exist in the model, the measure is the unique driver of it. It can be applied to "all" measures /accounts, or to a single.

II. Standard Excel Formatting capability: Native Standard Excel Format can also be applied and offer its richness for "static" reports scenarios. As soon as the option is selected in the add in, any type of standard Excel format can be created , including Conditionnal format. It is applied only to visible cells and not if a drill is performed or a new member is added.

  • For Report created with Custom Function, such as "SAP GETDATA" it's  the default format, no other option exists currently;
  • For a Table, it has to be  selected, unchecking the option as below:

hi 

Have you checked you role/permission related to the add in in SAC role definition?

Jeanne

entry.title: List Report Controller Extension - custom button plus lifecycle method overrides
entry.content:
I needed to add an action button to a custom List Report app. I used the usual action button controller extension to add the button and process the press event:

manifest:

 

 "extends": {
            "extensions": {
                "sap.ui.controllerExtensions": {
                    "sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport.view.ListReport": {
                        "controllerName": "... .equipbcodelr.ext.controller.ListReportExt",
  "sap.ui.generic.app": {
    "zqmm_c_equipment_bc": {
      "EntitySet": "zqmm_c_equipment_bc",
        "Actions": {
          "barcodeSearch": {
            "id": "barcodeSearch",
            "text": "Barcode Search",
            "press": "scanMe",
            "requiresSelection": false
          },

 

 ext controller:

 

sap.ui.define([
  "sap/m/MessageToast"
], function(MessageToast) {
  "use strict";

  return { 
      scanMe: function(oEvent) {
          MessageToast.show("Custom handler invoked.");
          ...

 

This works great. However, I also want to override the onInit( ) method of the controller to prep a local JSON model. It does not allow me to override the lifecycle methods. To override the lifecycle methods I found out my controller needs to be like this:

 

sap.ui.define([
  "sap/ui/core/mvc/ControllerExtension",
	"sap/suite/ui/generic/template/extensionAPI/extensionAPI"
], function(ControllerExtension, BaseObject,ExtensionAPI) {
    'use strict';

  return ControllerExtension.extend("...ext.controller.ListReportExt",{
      override:{
        onInit: function(oEvent){
              . . .

 

As soon as I change my controller to:

it no longer executes the press event of my custom action function scanMe: function( ).

How can I combine these two, have my controller handle the custom action button as well as override the lifecycle methods like onInit( )?

Would appreciate any hints.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Safety Data Sheet Customization and Generation
entry.content:
Hallo Michael ( @Michael_Mulder ),
may I use this way of interaction to get my question answered 🙂

With the help of Mathias (incident solved) I was able to generate my SDS...

Now I am at the situation that I do an English presentation showing the DE SDS...
Or think about Christoph, who is in an international company that might want to have the DE SDS not in German but in English...

Is there the possibility to access this configuration or to "add" languages to an country (Belgium has even three languages assigned 😊)?


I checked community, IMG, the 2408 PRC session (here Ingo just stated: "behind there is obviously configuration behind, that the German SDS needs to be in German"), but do not find, where to configure this?

Thanks in advance for your answer
Harry

entry.title: SAC - Read description of hierarchy node from variable via script
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have created a SAC story based on a BW Live connection. A cost center hierarchy node (variable) must be selected in the associated prompt. I would like to output the text/description belonging to the node in a text field using a script. Unfortunately, I can't do that. When I look at the content of the variable in the input prompt, I only get the variable name and value. Is there a way to get the associated description? I tried a lot without success.

Best regards

Steffen

entry.title: Re: Invoice pricing and services date equal to sy-datum
entry.content:
Hello,

I should create a new routine Z01, on the base of the 001 (in use), the 011 and the requested fields?


FORM DATEN_KOPIEREN_Z01.

* Header data
VBRK-FKDAT = SY-DATUM.

* Item data
VBRP-FBUDA = SY-DATUM.

VBRP-PRSDT = SY-DATUM.

* Additional split criteria
  DATA: BEGIN OF ZUK,
          MODUL(3) VALUE '001',
          VTWEG LIKE VBAK-VTWEG,
          SPART LIKE VBAK-SPART,
        END OF ZUK.
  ZUK-SPART = VBAK-SPART.
  ZUK-VTWEG = VBAK-VTWEG.
  VBRK-ZUKRI = ZUK.

ENDFORM.

entry.title: Create Batch Split in Delivery with BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hello,
I will share the mapping of a  BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE to perform Batch Split of Delivery (TCode VL03N).

REPORT ztest.

DATA:
  ls_header_data    TYPE bapiobdlvhdrchg,
  ls_header_control TYPE bapiobdlvhdrctrlchg,
  lv_delivery       TYPE bapiobdlvhdrchg-deliv_numb,
  ls_techn_control  TYPE bapidlvcontrol,
  lt_item_data      TYPE TABLE OF bapiobdlvitemchg,
  ls_item_data      TYPE bapiobdlvitemchg,
  lt_item_control   TYPE TABLE OF bapiobdlvitemctrlchg,
  ls_item_control   TYPE bapiobdlvitemctrlchg,
  lt_return         TYPE TABLE OF bapiret2.

" Input Data
lv_delivery = '0123456789'. "number of delivery 
DATA(lv_material) = '0123456789'. "number of material (matnr)
DATA(lv_item_000010) = '000010'. "number of item (posnr)
DATA(lv_qty_000010) = '0'.

DATA(lv_item_900001) = '900001'. "Number of item in the batch split
DATA(lv_qty_900001) = '6'.  "quantity you want to use from this batch
DATA(lv_batch_900001) = 'BATCH202501'. "(charg / batch)

DATA(lv_item_900002) = '900002'. "Number of item in the batch split
DATA(lv_qty_900002) = '4'. "quantity you want to use from this batch
DATA(lv_batch_900002) = 'BATCH202502'. "(charg / batch)

"START - HEADER DATA
ls_header_data-deliv_numb = lv_delivery.

"START - HEADER CONTROL
ls_header_control-deliv_numb = lv_delivery.

"START - TECHN_CONTROL
ls_techn_control-upd_ind = 'U'.

"START - ITEM_DATA - 000010
ls_item_data-deliv_numb = lv_delivery.
ls_item_data-deliv_item = lv_item_000010.
ls_item_data-material = |{ lv_material ALPHA = IN }|.
ls_item_data-dlv_qty = lv_qty_000010.
ls_item_data-dlv_qty_imunit = lv_qty_000010.
ls_item_data-fact_unit_nom = '1'.
ls_item_data-fact_unit_denom = '1'.
ls_item_data-conv_fact = '1'.
ls_item_data-dlv_qty_st_flo = lv_qty_000010.
APPEND ls_item_data TO lt_item_data.

"START - ITEM_CONTROL - 000010
ls_item_control-deliv_numb = lv_delivery.
ls_item_control-deliv_item = lv_item_000010.
ls_item_control-chg_delqty = abap_true.
APPEND ls_item_control TO lt_item_control.

"START - ITEM_DATA - 900001
ls_item_data-deliv_numb = lv_delivery.
ls_item_data-deliv_item = lv_item_900001.
ls_item_data-material = |{ lv_material ALPHA = IN }|.

ls_item_data-batch = lv_batch_900001.
ls_item_data-hieraritem = lv_item_000010.
ls_item_data-usehieritm = '1'.

ls_item_data-dlv_qty = lv_qty_900001.
ls_item_data-dlv_qty_imunit = lv_qty_900001.
ls_item_data-fact_unit_nom = '1'.
ls_item_data-fact_unit_denom = '1'.
ls_item_data-conv_fact = '1'.
ls_item_data-dlv_qty_st_flo = lv_qty_900001.
APPEND ls_item_data TO lt_item_data.

"START - ITEM_CONTROL - 900001
ls_item_control-deliv_numb = lv_delivery.
ls_item_control-deliv_item = lv_item_900001.
ls_item_control-chg_delqty = abap_true.
APPEND ls_item_control TO lt_item_control.

"START - ITEM_DATA - 900002
ls_item_data-deliv_numb = lv_delivery.
ls_item_data-deliv_item = lv_item_900002.
ls_item_data-material = |{ lv_material ALPHA = IN }|.

ls_item_data-batch = lv_batch_900002.
ls_item_data-hieraritem = lv_item_000010.
ls_item_data-usehieritm = '1'.

ls_item_data-dlv_qty = lv_qty_900002.
ls_item_data-dlv_qty_imunit = lv_qty_900002.
ls_item_data-fact_unit_nom = '1'.
ls_item_data-fact_unit_denom = '1'.
ls_item_data-conv_fact = '1'.
ls_item_data-dlv_qty_st_flo = lv_qty_900002.
APPEND ls_item_data TO lt_item_data.

"START - ITEM_CONTROL - 900002
ls_item_control-deliv_numb = lv_delivery.
ls_item_control-deliv_item = lv_item_900002.
ls_item_control-chg_delqty = abap_true.
APPEND ls_item_control TO lt_item_control.

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE'
  EXPORTING
    header_data    = ls_header_data
    header_control = ls_header_control
    delivery       = lv_delivery
    techn_control  = ls_techn_control
  TABLES
    item_data      = lt_item_data
    item_control   = lt_item_control
    return         = lt_return.

IF lt_return[] IS INITIAL.

  CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
    EXPORTING
      wait = abap_true.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Does the SAP Enable Now Certification will be retired...
entry.content:
Hi @german_aguirre 
When the SAP Certification is retired at the end of March 2025, everyone who is certified today will get another 12 months of validity, but will then not be able to extend it any further.
Kind regards,
Margit

entry.title: Re: Portuguese National Budget for 2025- Payroll Legal Changes
entry.content:
Hi Anabela,

How should the system works if the income is > 5.000, and is the 10th year of the benefict?

We implemented the 3550417 note, but it is not clear if the system looks for the limits.

Could you please help us to clarify this?

Kind regards

Aurora Costa

entry.title: Issue with Using MAX Formula in SAP Build Apps - Only First Row Accessible
entry.content:
Hello,

I am facing an issue when trying to use the MAX formula in SAP Build Apps. I want to get the maximum value from a specific column in my data variable. However, when I try to select a column, I can only choose it from the first row (e.g., data.App1[0].Qty) instead of selecting the entire column (e.g., data.App1[].Qty).

Expected behavior:

  • The MAX function should be able to evaluate the entire list of numeric values in a column.

Observed behavior:

  • The formula editor only allows selecting a column from the first row (data.App1[0].Qty), which does not provide the expected result for the whole dataset.

Has anyone encountered this issue before? Is there a workaround or a correct way to reference an entire column in SAP Build Apps formulas?

entry.title: Re: BAPI / Simulate API alternative for BAPI: BAPI_PRICES_CONDITIONS in SAP Public cloud
entry.content: Dear Gahan, I hope you find yourself well! Thank you for joining the community. As soon as possible, a technical expert will contact you to clarify your question. I am adjusting the tags to redirect the issue to the right team. Best Regards, Erick Goulardt SAP Support

entry.title: Re: FSM - The Query API returns fewer rows than specified...
entry.content: Thank you for informing me that this feature is available in the Analytics & Reporting app. I would like to reiterate that the LIMIT function is functioning correctly for values below 100. The documentation at the top of the Query API page may need to be updated to accurately reflect the behavior of the API.

entry.title: Re: Special Edition on Data Federation and the KSA Data Center
entry.content:
Hi,

this has been shared in our 'What's new' on Help Portal as part of the December release as 'Cross Data Center Connections' and 'New Data Center' and should be available in test as well as production tenants IF their are on the new the multi-cloud environment of SAP BTP as the integration platform.

Best

Corinna

entry.title: Re: DATE OF INCOMING DELIVERY

entry.title: Re: Request for Adjustment of Movement Type for Goods Rec...
entry.content: The movement type is always 101, and I don’t have authorization to modify it as the field is grayed out.

entry.title: Re: CAP Multitenancy TypeScript application fails to access/create tenants
entry.content: Hello nicoj, I'm facing the same issue, have you found a solution?

entry.title: Restricting Input Box to Accept Only Numeric Data in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created a Data Entity with a field where the data type is set to Number. Then, I created a Page Variable with the data type also set to Number.

I added an Input Box and bound it to the Page Variable. The data entered in the Input Box is supposed to be stored in the data entity field, which only accepts numeric values.

Issue:

Even though the data type is set to Number in both the Page Variable and the Data Entity field, the Input Box still allows the user to enter and save non-numeric values.

Question:

How can I restrict the Input Box to accept only numeric values and prevent the user from entering non-numeric characters?

entry.title: Re: Extending a Standard API - A Guide to Enhancing API_QUALITYNOTIFICATION
entry.content:
Dear SAP Members,

We recently worked on API extension's. Please see the steps below.

In my case we needed to add 2 additional fields in the output

1) Find service definition name from sap.api.com. Go to hana studio, search->'ABAP Search Object'.

   Enter the service name ''API_FUNCTIONALLOCATION'.

 

 

2) in my case, i need to add 2 fields under 'A_FunctionalLocation'.

   you need to find the lower level view to add the fields.

  Go to SE11, enter the view name:

 

 

again, open SE11 and check 'R_FunctionalLocationTP'.

 

 

 

again open SE11 and check if any view is available under I_FUNCTIONALLOCATION.

 

 

A_FunctionalLocation

    R_FunctionalLocationTP

     I_FUNCTIONALLOCATION

 

So we need to extend the lower level view :      I_FUNCTIONALLOCATION.

1) Extend the CDS view using HANA.

sample logic below:

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZXXXXXX'
@EndUserText.label: 'Functional Location Service Extension'
extend view I_FunctionalLocation with ZXXXXXXXX

association [1..1] to Jest as _jest on $projection.MaintObjectInternalID = _jest.objnr and _jest.inact = ''
{
_jest.stat as stat,
_jest.inact as inact
}

 

Nest step is extend the view entity option while creating the CDS view for upper levels:

Create the extended view for 2 upper levels (in my case 😞

**************************************************************************************

 

extend view entity R_FunctionalLocationTP with {
I_FunctionalLocation.stat,
I_FunctionalLocation.inact
}

*****************************************************************************************

extend view entity A_FunctionalLocation with {
_FunctionalLocationTP.stat,
_FunctionalLocationTP.inact
}

***********************************************************************************

Once CDS views extended, Add & activate the service using t.code '/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE'.

select 'Add service' and find service 'API_FUNCTIONALLOCATION'.

Once it is activated, check in SICF if it is activated or not. If not activate 

 

Mandatory thing here is, select the service and 'Load the metadata' in '/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE'.

Test the service, IN my case it is GET method.

 

Thank You,

SRini.

entry.title: Re: Report Painter - Exit or BADI or ENH

entry.title: Re: Launching the RISE with SAP Methodology Dashboard for Your SAP Transformation Journey
entry.content:
Hello,

@wagener-mark data collection happens once per week via Early Watch Alert. Usually beginning of the week. New data is visible later 2-3 days later in the dashboard. So in your case, if you just switched on SUSG/SCMON mid of last week, this should be visible in the dashboard mid-end of this week.

@AhmarImam can you see the system view tile, but can't select any systems to show the dashboard for? Or can you select systems, but then don't see any data for the selected system in the dashboard? Please open a support incident for your question on component SV-CLM-RMD. In the incident you can also share details on the system you are referring to and we can check specifically for that system.

BR,
Markus

entry.title: Re: In SAP Business One, how can I check how many items have been issued against my Employee Code?
entry.content:
Hello,

You wanna know how many lines of marketing documents that the employee is the owner of the document?

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: How to use I_ProductTP_2 in mock-framework?
entry.content:
It depends on the exact requirements, but in general, when using EML and writing a unit test for it, I would first go towards mocking the RAP BO. Likely with the Transactional Buffer Double framework (https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-development-tools-user-guide/transactional-buffer-double-support) when just doing CRUD operations. Then the inner workings of the RAP BO would not be tested, but at least you would know that your EML itself is valid.

For complex and important processes, a test on a higher level of the testing pyramid, like an integration test with real data, would then be an additional option.

entry.title: Re: Request for Adjustment of Movement Type for Goods Rec...
entry.content: Did you try via MIGO where also, without P/O reference, system will allow to post with 501 movement type.  For this to happen, select "Goods Receipt" and "Other"

entry.title: Re: Missing connection of material in plant to the material ledger+C+470
entry.content: Please execute below SE38 program with material and plant(valuation area). FML_REPAIR_ML_MASTERDATA

entry.title: Re: How do you define a workflow consultant?
entry.content: This is actually a very good question. As an FI functional consultant,  I faced a situation where changes were needed in the approval matrix for parked documents workflow. The approvals determination logic were quite complicated, somehow I handled it, there was a lot of pain. Now, the workflows work as expected, but my management didn’t even realize this was outside my actual responsibilities.

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud Standard Model: What’s New as of 2025-02-03?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community members,

I'm excited to start 2025 with a fresh wave of SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud Standard Model (SAP PaPM Cloud SM) features and enhancements, focusing on Administration, Process, RFA and Layout functionality.

If you haven’t had the opportunity to explore the previous blog posts shared by my colleagues, feel free to check out this PaPMCloudWhatsNew tag for quick access. 

Let’s dive in and explore the updates!


Administration

SAP PaPM Cloud SM integration with SAP Cloud Transport Management

The much-awaited integration of SAP PaPM Cloud SM to SAP Cloud Transport Management is now available for administrators and content managers. To gain further insight, visit the SAP PAPM Cloud SM integration with SAP cTMS blog post.


Addition of the ENVIRONMENTS_ACCESS_READ Role

We are introducing the ‘ENVIRONMENTS_ACCESS_READ’ role, providing administrators with read-only access to the Environment Access Management (EAM) screen. This allows them to view its contents without making any modifications. Previously, the only available role, ‘ENVIRONMENTS_ACCESS_ALL’ granted both read and edit permissions.

When the Administrator is assigned with ‘ENVIRONMENTS_ACCESS_READ’ role, the ‘Edit’ button on the EAM screen is deactivated.

To learn more about the EAM screen, check out our earlier SAP PaPM Cloud SM: Introducing the Environment Access Management Screen blog post. For details on role assignments, refer to the Administration Guide through this link.

 

Process Management

Change of Column Title from 'Process ID' to 'Process'

In the Process Management screen, the Process ID column name has been changed to 'Process' to align with the Process field used in other screens such as Modeling (process template) and Process Scheduler.



Layout

Enhancement of Default Layout Functionality

In our previous New Layout Functionality blog post, we highlighted the ability to copy a public layout to the private layout. Today, we’re pleased to announce an enhancement to this feature, enabling users to set their own default layout on the private layout as well.

The improved Private Default Layout functionality is now available across the System, Administration, Show, Analyze, Visualize, and Report elements screens. With this update, users can create and save a Private Default layout that is exclusive to them, reducing the dependency on public layouts that others can modify. This offers greater flexibility and more personalized experience in managing layout settings.

Key Highlights of the Enhanced Features:

  • Individual Default Settings for Both Private and Public Layout: Default layout settings are now available separately for both the private and public sections within the Show, Analyze, and Visualize screens. The default setting is no longer applied globally for all users. Each user can now define their own default layout.
  • Private Layouts: When a user creates a new private layout, it’s automatically set as their default layout. Similarly, if a user moves or copies a public layout to the private section, this layout will also be automatically set as their default.
  • Removed Default Layouts: If a user removes their default layout, the system will automatically reset the default layout to the public layout named ‘Standard’. If no other layout is available except the Standard layout, it will be set as the user's default layout.

For more information, visit our Application Help.


RFA

Addition of Extension Fields for RFA AP/AR Items

When working with SAP Profitability and Performance Management Cloud Standard Model (SAP PaPM Cloud SM), posting allocations to SAP systems for certain countries requires the inclusion of a Business Place field. This is crucial for compliance with legal and statutory reporting requirements and ensuring successful allocation postings across SAP systems. To fulfill this requirement, a new enhancement has been introduced for Accounts Payable (AP) and Accounts Receivable (AR) items. This enhancement adds extension fields to these Remote Function Adapters (RFAs), enabling users to map Business Places for their postings.

This feature is particularly valuable for multinational companies operating in regions where Business Place is mandatory for legal reporting, ensuring compliance with country-specific regulations. By supporting Business Place mapping, it eliminates barriers to allocation postings, improves reporting accuracy, and provides a compliant and efficient way for managing AR and AP postings across various company codes. This advancement makes SAP PaPM Cloud SM more robust and adaptable to global business needs, empowering users to streamline their legal and statutory reporting processes seamlessly.

 

Thank you and stay tuned for the next edition of our “What’s New” series.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - How to Configure Deployed Secure Parameter in HTTP Adapter Authentication
entry.content:
Hi

Thanks for sharing. 

One thing I would recommend is that you specify the artifact name as a externalized parameter in the iflow.  It does require a few more steps, but it will simplify the monitoring and help us understand where an artifact is used. 

Daniel Graversen

entry.title: Re: Accrual object posting via ACACTREE01

Thanks

entry.title: 101 and 261 movement type
entry.content:
Hello,

When I post a 101 movement for a Production Order for previous dates it creates a document. 

For example;

Posting date: 02.02.2025

Doc. Date: 03.02.2025

When I processed the COGI entry it creates another document for 261 movement.

Posting date: 03.02.2025

Doc. Date: 03.02.2025

The question is; Why the Posting date for 261 is not the same with 101?

 

Best regards

Bünyamin

entry.title: Issue with Dropdown Selection Affecting Visibility in SAP Fiori Elements (CAP Project)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm working on an SAP Fiori Elements project using CAP (Cloud Application Programming Model) and have encountered a strange behavior with a dropdown selection controlling the visibility of two sections.

Expected Behavior

  • When selecting "Email" from the dropdown, only the Email section should be visible.
  • When selecting "ServiceNow Incident", only the ServiceNow section should be visible.
  • At any given time, only one section should be displayed.

  • Current Issue

    The dropdown does change values correctly, but the sections do not update their visibility as expected.  both sections do not switch properly.

    Implementation Details

    1. NotificationType.js (Dropdown Event Handler)

    This script is responsible for updating the binding context when the user selects an option from the dropdown.  

    sap.ui.define([], function () {
    "use strict";

    return {
    onSelect: function (oEvent) {
    var oSource = oEvent.getSource();
    var oBindingContext = oSource.getBindingContext();

    if (!oBindingContext) {
    console.warn("No binding context found for the selected item.");
    return;
    }

    var sSelectedKey = oSource.getSelectedKey();

    if (sSelectedKey === "Email") {
    oBindingContext.setProperty("email_active", true);
    oBindingContext.setProperty("snow_active", false);
    oBindingContext.setProperty("error_desc", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("email_addr", "");
    } else if (sSelectedKey === "ServiceNowIncident") {
    oBindingContext.setProperty("email_active", false);
    oBindingContext.setProperty("snow_active", true);
    oBindingContext.setProperty("business_service", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("cmdb_ci", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("external_system_name", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("external_ticket_number", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("service_offering", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("impact", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("urgency", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("category", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("subcategory", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("assignment_group", "");
    oBindingContext.setProperty("created_by", "");
    }
    }
    };
    });

    2. Fragment: ThisNotification.fragment.xml

    This fragment contains the dropdown selection component.

    <core:FragmentDefinition xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:macros="sap.fe.macros" xmlns:l="sap.ui.layout">
    <l:VerticalLayout core:require="{handler: 'idocmonitorconfiguration/ext/fragment/NotificationType'}">
    <!-- Dropdown (Select) Component -->
    <Select id="selectNotificationType" change="handler.onSelect" editable="{= ${ui>/editMode} === 'Editable'}"
    selectedKey="{= ${snow_active} ? 'ServiceNowIncident' : 'Email' }">
    <core:Item id="item1" key="ServiceNowIncident" text="ServiceNow incident"/>
    <core:Item id="item2" key="Email" text="Email"/>
    </Select>
    </l:VerticalLayout>
    </core:FragmentDefinition>

    3. annotations.cds (UI Visibility Logic)

    The visibility of sections should depend on email_active and snow_active.

    {
    $Type: "UI.CollectionFacet",
    Label: "Email",
    ID: "Email",
    Facets: [
    {
    $Type: "UI.ReferenceFacet",
    ID: "Email1",
    Target: "@UI.FieldGroup#Email"
    }
    ],
    ![@UI.Hidden]: email_active
    },
    {
    $Type: "UI.CollectionFacet",
    Label: "Snow",
    ID: "Snow",
    Facets: [
    {
    $Type: "UI.ReferenceFacet",
    ID: "snow",
    Target: "@UI.FieldGroup#snow"
    }
    ],
    ![@UI.Hidden]: snow_active
    }

entry.title: Re: Issue with Dropdown Selection Affecting Visibility in SAP Fiori Elements (CAP Project)
entry.content: sometimes i click on email and the snow showup , sometimes i click on serviceNow and the email showup so it's not stable

entry.title: kc𝚎x invitation code: "KUT999" (Best Benefits for Lifetime!)

entry.title: Re: How to avoid this splitting of invoices in s4hana pub...
entry.content: remove ship to partner from billing type partner procedure. by default, partners are header data and if different, sap will split invoice.

entry.title: Code d'invitation kc𝚎x : "UK1991" (Meilleurs avantages à vie !)
entry.content: Quel est le code d'invitation KC𝚎X ? Le code d'invitation KC𝚎X « UK1991 » est utilisé. Il s'agit du meilleur code d'invitation au monde, offrant la réduction de commission la plus élevée et une validité à vie. Vous bénéficierez d'une réduction de 30 % sur les frais de trading lors de votre inscription à KC𝚎X, vous aidant ainsi à commencer avantageusement votre voyage dans le monde de la cryptographie.

entry.title: Código de invitación Kc𝚎x: "KUT999" (¡Los mejores beneficios para toda la vida!)
entry.content: ¿Qué es el código de invitación KC𝚎X? Se utiliza el código de invitación KC𝚎X "UK1991". Es el mejor código de invitación del mundo, que ofrece el mayor descuento en comisiones y validez de por vida. Obtendrá un 30% de descuento en las tarifas comerciales al registrarse en KC𝚎X, lo que le ayudará a comenzar su viaje en el mundo de las criptomonedas de manera ventajosa.

entry.title: Kod polecajacy Kc𝚎x: "KUT999" (Najlepsze korzyści na całe życie!)
entry.content: Jaki jest kod polecajacy KC𝚎X? Używany jest kod zaproszenia KC𝚎X "UK1991". Jest to najlepszy kod polecajacy na świecie, oferujący najwyższą zniżkę prowizyjną i dożywotnią ważność. Rejestrując się w KC𝚎X, otrzymasz 30% zniżki na opłaty transakcyjne, co pomoże Ci korzystnie rozpocząć podróż w świecie kryptowalut.

entry.title: Kc𝚎x zvací kód: "UK1991" (Nejlepší výhody na celý život!)
entry.content: Jaký je zvací kód KC𝚎X? Používá se kód pozvánky KC𝚎X "UK1991". Je to nejlepší referenční kód na světě, který nabízí nejvyšší slevu na provizi a doživotní platnost. Při registraci do KC𝚎X získáte 30% slevu na poplatky za obchodování, což vám pomůže výhodně začít vaši cestu v kryptosvětě.

entry.title: Re: Grafana API - How to leverage it to monitor SAP Data Intelligence Cloud
entry.content: Very informative Blog..

entry.title: Koda povabila Kc𝚎x: "KUT999" (Najboljše ugodnosti za vse življenje!)
entry.content: Kakšna je koda povabila KC𝚎X? Uporabljena je koda vabila KC𝚎X " KUT999 ". Je najboljša referenčna koda na svetu, ki ponuja najvišji popust pri proviziji in velja do konca življenja. Ob prijavi v KC𝚎X boste prejeli 30-odstotni popust na provizije za trgovanje, kar vam bo pomagalo, da boste ugodno začeli svojo pot v kripto svetu.

entry.title: How to get UDI Last Inserted Code value?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a UDT of type "No object with Auto Increment" and I am adding records to it using DI API. This is working fine.

I am trying to catch the Last Inserted ID/Code after the Adding the record to the UDT but for some reason the Event et_FORM_DATA_ADD is not catching it.

public static void AddRecordToUDT(SAPbouiCOM.ItemEvent pVal)
{
    SAPbouiCOM.Form oForm = Program.SBO_Application.Forms.GetForm(pVal.FormType.ToString(), pVal.FormTypeCount);
    
UserTable oAddrShippingTable = Program.SBO_Company.UserTables.Item($"{Program.nameSpace}_SHIPLABEL");
 
    oAddrShippingTable.UserFields.Fields.Item($"U_{Program.nameSpace}_FNAME").Value = oForm.DataSources.UserDataSources.Item("EditWhName").ValueEx;
    oAddrShippingTable.UserFields.Fields.Item($"U_{Program.nameSpace}_FADDR1").Value = oForm.DataSources.UserDataSources.Item("EditWhAdd1").ValueEx;
    oAddrShippingTable.UserFields.Fields.Item($"U_{Program.nameSpace}_FADDR2").Value = oForm.DataSources.UserDataSources.Item("EditWhAdd2").ValueEx;
    oAddrShippingTable.UserFields.Fields.Item($"U_{Program.nameSpace}_FADDR3").Value = oForm.DataSources.UserDataSources.Item("EditWhAdd3").ValueEx;
    oAddrShippingTable.UserFields.Fields.Item($"U_{Program.nameSpace}_FADDR4").Value = oForm.DataSources.UserDataSources.Item("EditWhAdd4").ValueEx;
    oAddrShippingTable.Add();
}
 

public static void SBO_Application_DataEvent(ref SAPbouiCOM.BusinessObjectInfo pVal, out bool BubbleEvent)
{
BubbleEvent = true;

try
{
if (pVal.EventType == SAPbouiCOM.BoEventTypes.et_FORM_DATA_ADD && !pVal.BeforeAction && pVal.ActionSuccess)
{

// This is not working
bool v = true;
}
}
catch (Exception ex)
{
Program.SBO_Application.SetStatusBarMessage(ex.Message, SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Medium, true);

BubbleEvent = false;
}
}

Does the et_FORM_DATA_ADD event does not work for UDT? If so, how can I retrieve the last inserted ID?

Thank you in advance,

Federico

entry.title: Código de recomendação Kc𝚎x: "KUT999" (melhores benefícios para a vida!)
entry.content: Qual é oCódigo de recomendação Kc𝚎x? É utilizado o recomendação KC𝚎X "KUT999". É o melhor código de referência do mundo, oferecendo o maior desconto de comissão e validade vitalícia. Receberá um desconto de 30% nas taxas de negociação ao subscrever o KC𝚎X, ajudando-o a iniciar a sua jornada no mundo criptográfico de forma vantajosa.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP odata.flavor=v4 Deprecated
entry.content: Many thanks David. Is there any way to rename the property at service layer for the flatten structure? Whilst defining the service, I cannot refer to property subaccountGUID_subaccountGUID as it is not recognized. Has anything to do that the name of the association is the same as the key in the target entity? Thanks!

Cheers

Jens

entry.title: Improving File Processing Performance in Cloud Hot Folder on SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Symptoms of Performance Issues
Facing performance issues while processing files in the Cloud Hot Folder within a SAP Commerce Cloud environment is not uncommon. These issues can manifest as slow response times, queued processes, and overall workflow inefficiencies. Addressing these problems methodically is crucial to identifying and resolving the underlying causes. In this article, I will explain how to enhance file processing performance in the Cloud Hot Folder through specific configuration adjustments.
 
Optimizing Configurations
To speed up the Cloud Hot Folder Impex process, it is essential to improve the performance by optimizing configurations. Below are the official recommendations that have proven effective over time.
 
Adjusting Essential Properties
To enhance the Cloud Hot Folder experience, you should add the following properties in the Cloud Portal under hcs_common:
  • azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.fixed-rate=15000
  • azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.core-pool-size=6
  • azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.max-pool-size=6
  • azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.fetch.batch-size=3
  • impex.import.workers=#cores * 2
  • azure.hotfolder.storage.delete.remote.files=true/false
Explanation of Properties
azure.hotfolder.storage.delete.remote.files:
What it does: Determines whether to delete remote files from Azure storage after a successful import.
Configuration:
true: The remote files will be deleted after import, keeping the storage clean.
false: The remote files will remain in Azure storage, useful for backups or auditing purposes.
 
azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.core-pool-size:
What it does: Specifies the core number of threads for the Azure Hot Folder's thread pool.
Importance: Ensures a base number of threads are always available for processing.
 
azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.max-pool-size:
What it does: Specifies the maximum number of threads that can be created by the thread pool.
Importance: Determines the maximum simultaneous processing capacity, preventing overload.
 
azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.fetch.batch-size:
What it does: Determines the number of files to fetch in a single batch from Azure Storage for processing.
Example: If set to 3, each batch operation will fetch up to 3 files.
Importance: Helps manage workload distribution and prevents bottlenecks.
 
azure.hotfolder.storage.polling.fixed-rate:
What it does: Specifies the fixed rate in milliseconds at which scheduled tasks should be executed.
Example: A value of 15000 means the hot folder will check for new files every 15 seconds.
Importance: Finding a balance between excessive calls and processing delays.
 
impex.import.workers:
What it does: Sets the number of threads used for import.
Importance: It is recommended not to set this higher than #cores * 2 to avoid system overload.
 
Conclusion
By following these recommendations and adjusting the properties as described, you can significantly improve the file processing performance in the Cloud Hot Folder on your SAP Commerce Cloud environment. Regularly monitor your performance and adjust configurations as needed to ensure a more efficient and organized operation.
 
Recommended Action
Test these configurations in your environment and share your experiences! If you have additional tips or adjustments that worked well, please leave a comment below. Together, we can build a valuable resource for optimizing SAP Commerce Cloud.

entry.title: Re: Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind the scenes!
entry.content:
Dear TIH Experts,

I am wondering, does anybody know a way to read Skill/Compentency Data from Talent intelligence hub via API? We would like to extract these information and use them in our production planning software to help the people plan based on these skills/competencies. So far we did not find any odata API for it. Only this Influence request: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/330466 Does anybody know more?

Is it planned to have granular permissions for different attribute types (read only for skills) and read/write for competencies?

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/334603

Kind regards,

Simo9n
